# Concepts

## Abstract

The goal is to use the Meta Quest 3 as an HID for motorized systems and to provide the ability to control such system by hand motions. 

## References

[github.com/SwannSchilling/RobotArm](https://github.com/SwannSchilling/RobotArm)

[github.com/mcd005/VR-Controlled-Robot-Arm](https://github.com/mcd005/VR-Controlled-Robot-Arm)

[github.com/marshallrichards/turbodrone](https://github.com/marshallrichards/turbodrone)

[github.com/pascallanger/diy-multiprotocol-tx-module](https://github.com/pascallanger/diy-multiprotocol-tx-module)
